textByHashes.c2417a3479309403ed4944530883ef070ebb8b04: I'm... I'm fine... Please... leave me alone...
textByHashes.3edb3b55b64859649bb12e3ed0b670cd0f33008c: No... No help... I'll fix it myself...
textByHashes.2373cd447abf6ed81e8b96a06e188c0855330bab: Bandages... I was trying to make... bandages. Seaweed and a... a palm leaf.
textByHashes.226e429b80f8833b297c01cadc79cac8f873a73d: I'm sorry for not trusting you, it's just... Well, I guess it doesn't matter now. I'm Floopa. Thank you for saving my life.
